---
title: "Report"
author: "Shruti Pillai"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Analysis

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

potential_drinks <- readr::read_csv("Data/coffee-shop-sales.csv",
                                    show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(coin = transaction_qty * unit_price)

potential_drinks |>
  distinct(store_location) |>
  arrange(store_location)

hot_spot <- "Hell's Kitchen"
hells_kitchen_sips <- potential_drinks |>
  filter(store_location == hot_spot)

crowd_faves <- hells_kitchen_sips |>
  group_by(product_detail) |>
  summarise(total_qty = sum(transaction_qty, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total_qty))

cash_cows <- hells_kitchen_sips |>
  group_by(product_detail) |>
  summarise(total_revenue = sum(coin, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total_revenue))

crowd_faves
cash_cows

names(potential_drinks)
glimpse(potential_drinks)
str(potential_drinks)
```

```{r}
drink_summary <- crowd_faves |>
  left_join(cash_cows, by = "product_detail")

top10 <- drink_summary |>
  arrange(desc(total_revenue)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  mutate(product_detail = fct_reorder(product_detail, total_revenue))

p <- ggplot(top10, aes(x = total_revenue, y = product_detail)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C3E50") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format(prefix = "$")) +
  labs(
    title = "Hell's Kitchen: Top 10 Drinks by Total Revenue",
    x = "Total revenue (USD)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

p

tab <- drink_summary |>
  arrange(desc(total_revenue)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  transmute(
    drink = product_detail,
    total_quantity = total_qty,
    total_revenue = total_revenue
  )
top10_pop <- drink_summary |>
  arrange(desc(total_qty)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  mutate(product_detail = fct_reorder(product_detail, total_qty))

p_pop <- ggplot(top10_pop, aes(x = total_qty, y = product_detail)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C3E50") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Hell's Kitchen: Top 10 drinks by Popularity",
    x = "Total quantity sold",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

p_pop

tab_pop <- drink_summary |>
  arrange(desc(total_qty)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  transmute(
    drink = product_detail,
    total_quantity = total_qty,
    total_revenue = total_revenue
  )

knitr::kable(
  tab_pop,
  caption = "Top 10 drinks by total quantity sold (Hell's Kitchen)",
  digits = 2
)

readr::write_csv(
  tab_pop,
  file.path(out_dir, "hells_kitchen_top10_popularity_table.csv")
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "hells_kitchen_top10_popularity_bar.png"),
  plot = p_pop,
  width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

knitr::kable(
  tab,
  caption = "Top 10 Drinks by Total Revenue (Hell's Kitchen)",
  digits = 2
)

out <- "outputs"
dir.create(out, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out, "hells_kitchen_top10_revenue_bar.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

readr::write_csv(
  tab,
  file.path(out, "hells_kitchen_top10_revenue_table.csv")
)

fan_fave_1 <- crowd_faves |> slice_head(n = 1)
top_rev_1  <- cash_cows   |> slice_head(n = 1)

results_text <- paste0(
  "Hell’s Kitchen results: the most popular drink was ",
  fan_fave_1$product_detail, " (n = ", fan_fave_1$total_qty, " units). ",
  "The most lucrative drink was ", top_rev_1$product_detail,
  " (total revenue = $", round(top_rev_1$total_revenue, 2), "). ",
  "Overall, some drinks performed strongly on both metrics (e.g., Brazilian Lg and Ethiopia Lg), ",
  "suggesting they are both widely purchased and commercially important."
)

writeLines(results_text, file.path(out, "hells_kitchen_results.txt"))
```
